title: IEFA, BAIG: Big ETF Inflows
content:
Comparing units outstanding versus one week ago at the coverage universe of ETFs at ETF Channel, the biggest inflow was seen in the iShares Core MSCI EAFE ETF, which added 22,200,000 units, or a 1.3% increase week over week. Among the largest underlying components of IEFA, in morning trading today Spotify Technology is up about 0.3%, and Sea is lower by about 1.5%. And on a percentage change basis, the ETF with the biggest increase in inflows was the BAIG ETF, which added 20,000 units, for a 40.0% increase in outstanding units. VIDEO: IEFA, BAIG: Big ETF Inflows
